_comment: Three monthly headline sentiment prints used as OBR growth-input proxies. (a) S&P Global UK Services PMI (licensed series; we mirror only the published press-release headline). (b) GfK/NIESR Consumer Confidence Barometer (headline index; sub-indices are subscription-gated). (c) RICS UK Residential Market Survey house-price balance (headline net percentage; full back-set is RICS-subscription). All three are lawful fair-use summaries of publicly released headline values. Refreshed monthly when each release drops.

services_pmi.source: S&P Global / CIPS Flash UK Services PMI, March 2026

consumer_confidence.source: GfK / NIESR Consumer Confidence Barometer, March 2026

rics_price_balance.source: RICS UK Residential Market Survey, March 2026
